title: Trofers
description: Adds trophies that can be customized through data packs
body:
![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/37985539/134406322-bdc3df6b-18a3-4965-b6c4-25e25d9c2df2.png "")

Trofers is a mod that adds trophies which can be customized with items or entities through data packs.

Older versions of this mod can be found on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trofers).

The included data pack adds a trophy for every living entity, which have a 1/1000 chance of dropping when the corresponding entity is killed by a player. The drop rate for these trophies can be changed using the config. Entities from Quark, Alex's Mobs, Tinker's Construct and Thermal Expansion are also supported.

More information on how to create and customize your own trophies can be found on [GitHub](https://github.com/ochotonida/trofers/blob/HEAD/README.md).
